## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`php artisan test`)
- [ ] PHP style checked (`./vendor/bin/pint`) where applicable
- [ ] Frontend builds if UI changed (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if setup or behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
